recommendations.title: American Splendor
recommendations.overview: An original mix of fiction and reality illuminates the life of comic book hero everyman Harvey Pekar.

recommendations.title: The Extra Man
recommendations.overview: A man who escorts wealthy widows in New York's Upper East Side takes a young aspiring playwright under his wing.

recommendations.title: The Nanny Diaries
recommendations.overview: A college graduate goes to work as a nanny for a rich New York family. Ensconced in their home, she has to juggle their dysfunction, a new romance, and the spoiled brat in her charge.

recommendations.title: Things Heard & Seen
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that both her husband and their new home harbor sinister secrets after they leave Manhattan for small-town life.

recommendations.title: 10,000 Saints
recommendations.overview: A sweeping multigenerational story set against the backdrop of the raw, roaring New York City of the late 1980s; adoption, teen pregnancy, drugs, hardcore punk rock, the unbridled optimism and reckless stupidity of the young—and old—are all major ele

recommendations.title: Barton Fink
recommendations.overview: A renowned New York playwright is enticed to California to write for the movies and discovers the hellish truth of Hollywood.

recommendations.title: A Bridge Too Far
recommendations.overview: The story of Operation Market Garden—a failed attempt by the allies in the latter stages of WWII to end the war quickly by securing three bridges in Holland allowing access over the Rhine into Germany. A combination of poor allied intelligence and th

recommendations.title: Hello Ghost
recommendations.overview: A man's failed suicide attempt enables him to see ghosts, who later keep following him everywhere. It is now up to him to fulfill their wishes to make them go away.

recommendations.title: Fala Sério, Mãe!
recommendations.overview: Ângela Cristina, mother of teenager Maria de Lourdes, has to deal with the difficulties and delights of guiding her daughter during one of the most complicated stages of life.

recommendations.title: Easy Money
recommendations.overview: To inherit his mother-in-law's colossal fortune, a hard living gambling addict must change his unhealthy ways before it gets the best of him.
